rules.name: TLS Version Minimum
rules.description: All services must use TLS 1.2 or higher

rules.name: HSTS Enabled
rules.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security must be enabled

rules.name: HSTS Max Age
rules.description: HSTS max-age must be at least 31536000 seconds (1 year)

rules.name: X-Frame-Options
rules.description: X-Frame-Options header must be set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN

rules.name: Password Minimum Length
rules.description: Minimum password length must be at least 12 characters

rules.name: MFA Enforcement
rules.description: Multi-factor authentication must be enabled for all admin users

rules.name: Session Timeout
rules.description: Session timeout must be 30 minutes or less

rules.name: Account Lockout
rules.description: Account must lock after 5 or fewer failed attempts

rules.name: Password Complexity
rules.description: Password policy must require uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character

rules.name: Encryption at Rest
rules.description: Database encryption at rest must be enabled

rules.name: Encryption Algorithm
rules.description: Encryption must use AES-256

rules.name: Backup Encryption
rules.description: Database backups must be encrypted

rules.name: Connection Encryption
rules.description: Database connections must require SSL

rules.name: Audit Logging Enabled
rules.description: Audit logging must be enabled

rules.name: Log Retention
rules.description: Logs must be retained for at least 90 days

rules.name: Log Integrity
rules.description: Log integrity checking must be enabled

rules.name: Sensitive Data Masking
rules.description: PII must be masked in logs

rules.name: Firewall Enabled
rules.description: Host firewall must be enabled

rules.name: Default Deny Policy
rules.description: Firewall default policy must be deny

rules.name: SSH Key-Only Auth
rules.description: SSH must use key-based authentication only (no passwords)
